variables.notes: No total current assets line is presented on the Balance Sheet preview; this insurer-style statement of financial position does not appear to use a current/non-current classification.

candidates.row_label: Cash in hand and demand deposits
candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; best match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents, end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending balance, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents beginning of year
candidates.why: Cash flow beginning balance, not the preferred balance-sheet stock measure.

final_choice.row_label: Cash in hand and demand deposits

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet cash line rather than cash flow statement balances.
No total current liabilities line is presented on the Balance Sheet preview; this insurer-style statement does not appear to classify liabilities as current/non-current.

No clear current borrowings / short-term debt line is shown. Available debt labels such as 'Payables to credit institutions and central banks', 'Issued bonds', and 'Subordinated debt' are not identified as current, and lease liabilities are excluded by rule.

candidates.why: Exact match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Best available balance-sheet total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Leased assets
candidates.why: Tangible asset component, but not total PPE and includes leased assets only.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Leased properties
candidates.why: Tangible asset component, but not total PPE and includes leased assets only.

variables.notes: Used the reported total tangible assets line as the closest PPE total.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.
Direct operating cash flow total; exact match for net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flows from operating activities, discontinuing activities
candidates.why: Operating cash flow for discontinued activities only, not the main total.
